ddls:
CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "benchmark_name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags associated with the benchmark */,
  "baseline_result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the baseline result for the benchmark */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the benchmark was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the benchmark was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark run */,
  "loc" REAL /* Lines of code (LOC) in the benchmark */,
  "runtime_seconds" REAL /* Runtime of the benchmark in seconds */,
  "slowdown" REAL /* Slowdown factor compared to baseline */,
  "inline_cache_miss" INTEGER /* Number of inline cache misses */,
  "undefined_array_element" INTEGER /* Number of undefined array elements */,
  "switch_array_type" INTEGER /* Number of switch array type issues */,
  "non_contiguous_array_key" INTEGER /* Number of non-contiguous array keys */,
  "init_fields_outside_constructor" INTEGER /* Number of fields initialized outside the constructor */,
  "binary_operation_on_undefined" INTEGER /* Number of binary operations on undefined variables */,
  "polymorphic_function_call" INTEGER /* Number of polymorphic function calls */,
  "arguments_leaking" INTEGER /* Number of arguments leaking issues */,
  "typed_array" TEXT /* Type of typed array (if applicable) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_metrics_results" (
  "metric_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric result */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark run */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_metrics_results_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("run_id") REFERENCES benchmark_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_metrics_results_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_metrics_results_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the benchmark */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* Detailed changelog for this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_versions_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each run */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "run_date" TEXT /* Date the benchmark was run */,
  "run_description" TEXT /* Description of the run */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result associated with this run */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the benchmark was run */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration used for the benchmark run */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_runs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES benchmark_results ("result_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team or department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the benchmark */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the benchmark was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of the issue (e.g., inline cache miss, undefined array element) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the issue (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the issue is resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was resolved */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to resolve the issue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_issues_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., question, suggestion, feedback) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_comments_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmark_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, issue summary) */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benchmark_reports_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)
